questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a Define Behavioral Finance in your own words. 2.5 b Explain any two foundational concepts of Behavioral Finance. 2.5 c Define overconfidence bias in investors. 2.5 d What is meant by loss aversion? 2.5 e What are market anomalies? Give one example 2.5 f How does rational finance explain investor behavior? 2.5 g Explain the effect of heuristic in financial behavior. 2.5 h Define representativeness heuristic with an example. 2.5
Explain the scope and applications of Behavioral Finance in real-world investment and financial planning. 10
Critically evaluate the Efficient Market Hypothesis in light of behavioral perspectives. 10
Discuss various cognitive and emotional biases that impact investment decisions. Use real-world or hypothetical examples. 10
How does framing affect investment decisions? Illustrate with suitable scenarios. 10
Discuss the concept of calendar anomalies. How do they challenge the assumptions of market efficiency? 10
Explain Expected Utility Theory and its role in rational financial decision-making. 10
How do behavioral biases impact portfolio management and risk assessment? Provide practical examples 10
Analyze the role of emotional biases in major financial crises. Use the case of the Silicon Valley Bank crash to support your argument. 10
